file_insights.purpose: Public API barrel file for Media module
file_insights.pattern: Comprehensive barrel export with organized sections and clear documentation

file_insights.purpose: REST API controller for media endpoints
file_insights.architecture: JsonController with TSyringe dependency injection, extends BaseController

file_insights.database_integration: Prisma ORM based on naming conventions

file_insights.purpose: Business logic layer for media operations

file_insights.metadata: Module version, dependencies, permissions, and settings

patterns_discovered.pattern: Modular architecture with clear separation of concerns
patterns_discovered.description: Classic N-layer architecture: Controller → Service → Repository pattern
Extensive use of discriminated unions, strict typing, and Zod runtime validation for safety

patterns_discovered.usage: All classes decorated with @injectable() and dependencies injected via @inject()

patterns_discovered.description: Fine-grained permission checking at endpoint level

patterns_discovered.usage: Observable event system for reactive operations

patterns_discovered.structure: { success: boolean, data: T, meta?: object }

patterns_discovered.coverage: Every function, class, and public method documented

patterns_discovered.pattern: Multi-file upload support with batch operations
patterns_discovered.description: Parallel upload processing with error handling

gotchas_discovered.issue: MAX_FILE_SIZE, MAX_IMAGE_SIZE, MAX_VIDEO_SIZE constants defined but must be enforced at multiple levels
gotchas_discovered.risk: Large files could exhaust storage quota if validation is bypassed

gotchas_discovered.issue: All media operations must include organizationId validation
gotchas_discovered.risk: Cross-organization media leakage if organizationId checks are missed
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consistently use @CurrentOrgId() decorator and repository filtering

gotchas_discovered.issue: Thumbnail generation and image optimization are async operations
gotchas_discovered.complexity: Must handle race conditions if same media is processed multiple times
gotchas_discovered.consideration: generateThumbnail and optimize flags default to true, increasing latency

gotchas_discovered.issue: MIME type detection can be spoofed by uploaders
gotchas_discovered.solution: Should implement content-type validation beyond filename extension

gotchas_discovered.issue: Deleting media should clean up thumbnails, variants, and storage
gotchas_discovered.hook_point: beforeDelete and afterDelete hooks must handle cleanup
gotchas_discovered.risk: Orphaned files consuming storage if cleanup logic is incomplete

gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Should implement URL whitelist, size limits, and timeout controls

gotchas_discovered.consideration: Page numbering vs cursor-based pagination - verify implementation
gotchas_discovered.risk: Inconsistent pagination could cause data duplication or missed items

gotchas_discovered.issue: Hooks and events must be registered before module initialization
gotchas_discovered.timing: Race condition if events fire before subscribers are registered
gotchas_discovered.solution: Initialize hooks during module setup phase

gotchas_discovered.issue: getStorageUsage returns used space but doesn't enforce limits
gotchas_discovered.implementation: Must add quota checks during upload to prevent exceeding limits
gotchas_discovered.consideration: What happens when quota is exceeded - reject or queue?

gotchas_discovered.issue: Multiple simultaneous uploads could race for disk space or database constraints
gotchas_discovered.consideration: Ensure atomic operations for file creation and metadata storage
gotchas_discovered.risk: Partial uploads or corrupted metadata if transactions aren't properly handled

approach_outcome.summary: Complete Media module implementation with file upload, image processing, and comprehensive API

completeness.api_coverage: Complete (list, get, upload, update, delete, batch operations)
completeness.documentation: Complete (JSDoc for all public methods and types)

key_achievements: Full REST API with CRUD operations and pagination
Multipart file upload with optional URL-based upload
architecture_strengths: Clean separation of concerns (Controller → Service → Repository)
Organized barrel export with clear sections
Proper use of TypeScript discriminated unions
approach_outcome.implementation_approach: Systematic module development with Controller → Service → Repository layering, comprehensive types, validation schemas, and extensible hook system

recommendations.recommendation: Implement URL validation and SSRF protection for uploadFromUrl endpoint
recommendations.implementation: Add URL whitelist, DNS resolution checks, and timeout controls before fetching remote files

recommendations.recommendation: Implement content-type validation beyond MIME type claims
recommendations.implementation: Use file magic number (file signature) detection to verify actual file type
recommendations.benefit: Prevent malicious files with spoofed MIME types

recommendations.recommendation: Add storage quota enforcement during upload
recommendations.implementation: Check organization storage usage before allowing upload; implement quota-exceeded error handling

recommendations.recommendation: Implement comprehensive cleanup in delete operations
recommendations.implementation: Ensure thumbnails, variants, and temporary files are deleted from storage when media is deleted
recommendations.hook_point: afterDelete hook must handle all cleanup

recommendations.recommendation: Add pagination cursor support for large media libraries
recommendations.implementation: Implement cursor-based pagination in addition to offset-based for better performance

recommendations.recommendation: Implement database transaction support for concurrent uploads
recommendations.implementation: Wrap metadata creation and file storage in atomic database transaction
recommendations.benefit: Prevent partial uploads and corrupted metadata

recommendations.recommendation: Add structured logging throughout the media processing pipeline
recommendations.implementation: Log file uploads, processing steps, errors, and storage operations for debugging

recommendations.recommendation: Add image dimension validation to prevent extremely large uploads
recommendations.implementation: Validate image width/height against reasonable limits after processing

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test suite for upload edge cases
Add API contract documentation for media endpoints
recommendations.reference: API_CONTRACTS.md mentioned in controller but should be created
recommendations.content: Request/response schemas, error codes, permission requirements

recommendations.recommendation: Add event filtering/selectors to reduce hook subscription overhead
recommendations.implementation: Allow hooks to filter events by type, media type, or other criteria

recommendations.recommendation: Consider implementing image processing job queue
recommendations.implementation: Use async job queue (Bull, RabbitMQ) for thumbnail generation and optimization
